title: 7 Habits That Quietly Rewired My Productivity (No App Required)
description:
I spent years building elaborate productivity systems. Here's what actually worked.

In this video, I walk through the 7 simple habits that replaced my complicated setups — and why the highest-impact one has nothing to do with your morning routine.

[TIMESTAMPS_PLACEHOLDER]

These habits don't require an app, a subscription, or a perfect morning. They're practices you can return to on your worst days — which is exactly when they matter most.

If you're a knowledge worker, writer, or creator whose work is hard to measure and easy to lose track of, this one's for you.

Key habits covered: the shutdown ritual, weekly brain dump, eating one frog, the done list, 90-minute deep work blocks, writing tomorrow's priorities tonight, and tracking one metric per week.

📋 Free worksheet — The Simple Habit That Changed My Productivity:
https://worksheets-thebreathnetwork.vercel.app/get-worksheet?slug=the-simple-habit-that-changed-my-productivity

If this helped, subscribe — I write and make videos about building a working life that doesn't require willpower to maintain.
thumbnail_concept: Tarun at a clean desk, mid close-up, notebook open with a short handwritten list — one item circled. Text overlay: '7 HABITS. NO APP.' Warm morning light, neutral background, calm and intentional mood.
end_screen_suggestion: Surface a deep work or daily structure video — viewers who resonated with the 90-minute block concept will want the tactical follow-through on how to protect that time.
